title: Phi-3 Technical Report: A Highly Capable Language Model
description: Microsoft released Phi-3, showing that smaller models (3.8B parameters) can achieve remarkable performance rivaling much larger models. By curating high-quality textbook quality training data, Phi-3-mini matched Llama 2 7B and approached Mixtral 8x7B on benchmarks. This demonstrated that data quality can compensate for model size, challenging the bigger is always better paradigm.
